title: Brief the CISO
description:
Amaka: 'The CISO gets ninety seconds tomorrow. She has read the technical report. What she has not seen is a clear answer to three questions the board will push her on — and those are the ones I need you to answer.'

Write a structured note (minimum 180 words) covering:

1. How a single misconfigured URL-fetching feature — the import function — resulted in The Griot obtaining persistent credentials to Sankofa's production infrastructure. Trace the logic clearly: what made the server's position privileged, and why that privilege was exploitable without any additional authentication.

2. What the SQL injection and the SSRF had in common at the design level — not the technical mechanism, but the underlying failure that let both exist in a production system.

3. The single most important architectural control Sankofa should fund. One control — not a list. Justify it in terms of what it would have stopped in this specific investigation.

Write for the CISO, not for an engineer. No jargon without a one-line explanation. Amaka reads this before it reaches the boardroom.

widgetConfig.placeholder: CISO brief — plain language, three questions answered…
